testcase.classname: PlanetaryHoursService getCurrentPlanetaryHour should return current planetary hour information

testcase.name: PlanetaryHoursService getCurrentPlanetaryHour should handle different times of day correctly

testcase.classname: PlanetaryHoursService getCurrentPlanetaryHour should return consistent results for the same time

testcase.name: PlanetaryHoursService getForecast should handle different intervals correctly

testcase.name: PlanetaryHoursService getOptimalTimes should return optimal times for specific planet

testcase.name: PlanetaryHoursService getOptimalTimes should return empty array for invalid planet
